finding: torch.compile/Triton JIT fails on native Windows Python: Triton attempts to build cuda_utils.cp310-win_amd64.pyd via MinGW gcc; MinGW cannot link against CUDA MSVC .lib files (libcuda, libpython310 in CUDA v12.8/x64). FileNotFoundError [WinError 2]. Same failure in WSL2 daemon env (prior receipt). CC=gcc attempted and confirmed insufficient.
unblock: MSVC Build Tools (cl.exe) install — Triton on Windows requires MSVC ABI; MinGW cannot link against CUDA Toolkit .lib files.
